raw.title: The Hidden Value In The Human-AI Arrangement
raw.excerpt: The post The Hidden Value In The Human-AI Arrangement appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: The article examines how human-AI collaboration creates value through intersubjective relationships, suggesting AI could support sustainable systems if aligned with ecological ethics.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges AI ethics with biomimicry by framing computational systems as part of a larger ecological network.
